title: Ecliptic Evaders
content:

The '''Ecliptic Evaders''' was a mock [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], invented by [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek "Hobbie" Klivian]]. The unit was composed of Klivian and [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]], who had both [[Mutiny on the Rand Ecliptic/Legends|mutinied]] from the ''[[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|Rand Ecliptic]]'' to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==History==
After conducting a [[Mutiny on the Rand Ecliptic/Legends|mutiny]] aboard the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] ''[[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|Rand Ecliptic]]'', [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] and [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek "Hobbie" Klivian]] made their way to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Great Temple/Legends|base]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. After arriving, Klivian invented a mock [[Squadron/Legends|unit]] for the pair, named the Ecliptic Evaders.<ref name="Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

The Ecliptic Evaders were based in the [[Sullust system/Legends|Sullust system]] for a time. However, eventually the unit was split up as Darklighter and Klivian's skills were needed elsewhere and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] was forced to reassign them to outposts where they could serve more effectively.<ref name="GG3">[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back'', Second Edition]]</ref>

==Organization==
As a mock unit, the Ecliptic Evaders comprised two [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], both of whom had previously served on the Imperial ship ''Rand Ecliptic''.<ref name="Warfare" /> Biggs Darklighter, who wore emblem of the Ecliptic Evaders on his [[Flight helmet/Legends|flight helmet]],<ref name="Biggs">{{CCG|set=Premiere Limited|cardname=Biggs Darklighter}}</ref> fought as [[Red Three/Legends|Red Three]] during the Battle of Yavin and was killed during the engagement. Hobbie Klivian served as [[Rogue Four/Legends|Rogue Four]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], surviving the conflict and becoming a core member of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].<ref name="Warfare" />
